sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 74:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 74:1
items.html: When we discern only the substance in the vessels, we define them as “four phases.” When we want to include the records in each and every vessel, too, we define them as KHB ZON.
